textByHash.a8670070fb85f0ab2658213f548942e87efd897a: If you think I'm coming quietly, you've got another thing coming!
textByHash.e63cb92a288d1e65feaa5938803848e30708198c: It doesn't seem like I have any other choice.
textByHash.45e6b101e28633936a8c2908fec5a4afb641314a: Don't patronise me! Do you really think I'd be so foolish as to leave my own amulet at the scene of a murder? The amulet was stolen a few days ago. Someone must have planted it there to set me up!
textByHash.2a71b059d7c045eb594dc4ddfbcd44f6d924963f: I knew I shouldn't have taken this job!
textByHash.c459fdb494c79c95688489d8e97502c6f240ebc0: I needed money, badly. Some guy hired me for a simple robbery. Nice and straightforward, he said. All I had to do was break into that Carnillean house and retrieve something for him.
textByHash.347017c4e8a23c84ef9fed8e9350b3ec7b1d1d3d: I don't know. He kept his face hidden. All I know is that he was willing to pay a lot.
textByHash.bd9595e61fbb935c7fcd03fcc223e152b86ef53b: That had nothing to do with me! I admit, he saw me on my way out, but I was able to escape. I only found out he was dead after I got back to the Fight Arena!
textByHash.9685c5b3bdae21ff6f1afd491929fec6172100ad: No idea. I was told to deliver it to some cultists south of the city, which I did.
textByHash.aff1e8b4b326b1d0cbc2772e41b6d8528e499a33: No, that's the thing. They were very happy when I gave them the scroll, but they had no idea I'd been hired to retrieve it!
textByHash.5967a29c6242f79614bb187fae046bd51012573e: I told you, I don't know! He was meant to meet me in the bar earlier to pay me, but he never showed up. This is such a mess!
textByHash.0faab66c3cc2463625ce0bd56d2575ab2ae62781: Just some random scroll, but it wasn't even there! The whole thing was for nothing!
textByHash.3c1e0888be72c8078aee1e5f63683aa4b65b41e7: I was told to deliver it to some cultists south of the city.
textByHash.e5fbc98e938941c324624428862ba096a87a20c3: I told you, I don't even know who hired me! The guy was meant to meet me in the bar earlier to pay me, but he never showed up. This is such a mess!
textByHash.79a398c8bb0a0d0e736b920035bdc0d3e883d021: Good luck with that. He didn't seem like the kind of person who'd want to be found.
textByHash.382a61774dc6d7647a4ad5b92daa922048824320: So am I free to go?
textByHash.3a65d28662553ea6b0327f7e24d904021ccdf062: Ha! Nice joke. I'm better off on my own.
textByHash.0c050ecf83e6016ad5f0ce73c2baafda80bd0d21: I thought you were going to see that cult?
textByHash.d72d9a81bda518f54fb2e1bbf6681bb2b30bf7eb: Well I've told you everything I know, so no reason for you to still be lurking around here.
